title: EndpointType::Deserialize allocates String for known variants
description: EndpointType::Deserialize calls String::deserialize(d) unconditionally, heap-allocating a String for every Endpoint seen in a session response or Chat object. For the 7 known variants (Vtc, Payment, Blob, etc.) the String is immediately dropped after the match in from_uri(). Only the Other(s) variant actually needs ownership. A str-visitor approach (via serde's visit_str) would avoid the allocation for all known variants, keeping the alloc only for Other(s). Endpoints appear in Session.owner_endpoints and ChatContact.endpoints — low cardinality per response, but the pattern is worth fixing for consistency with how other enum deserializers in the codebase handle this.
